components-button.name: Button

stories.snippet: const Text = () => <Button variant="text">Label</Button>;

stories.name: Without Arrow
stories.snippet: const WithoutArrow = () => <Button variant="default" showArrow={false}>Label</Button>;

stories.name: With Icon
stories.snippet: const WithIcon = () => <Button variant="default" icon={<SearchOutlined />} showArrow={false}>Search</Button>;

stories.snippet: const DisabledPrimary = () => <Button variant="primary" disabled>Label</Button>;

stories.name: Loading
stories.snippet: const Loading = () => <Button variant="default" loading>Loading</Button>;

stories.name: Block
stories.snippet: const Block = () => <Button variant="default" block>Full Width</Button>;
